1.16.0: You can now sign in with Google and Apple.
Your favorite books now sync across all your devices when you're signed in.
Your reading plan — start date and plan type — now syncs across all your devices when you're signed in.
Your theme — light/dark, contrast, and dynamic colors — now syncs across all your devices. Turn on 'Sync across devices' in the Theme settings while signed in.
Your app language now syncs across all your devices. Turn on 'Sync across devices' in the language settings while signed in.

Your reading progress now syncs across all your devices in real time when you're signed in: marking a day, chapter, or verse as read on one device shows up automatically on the others, on the plans screen, the days screen, and the chapter screen. Your day notes sync too.
Clearer message when signing in fails because of internet connection problems.
Fixed an issue where the reading plan start date would disappear after signing out; it's now reset to today's date.
Fixed an issue that could stop a Bible version download when the app was in the background.
The Terms of Service and Privacy Policy links on the login screen now open when you tap them.
Fixed the Gospel of John showing the wrong text or appearing as not downloaded; it now downloads and displays correctly.
When your device has no Google account, signing in with Google now explains this and lets you add one, instead of showing a generic error.
When you sign in with Apple without sharing your email, the app now explains that your email is required and asks you to try again, instead of showing a generic error.
1.15.0: The reading plan screen now uses a two-column layout on tablets and larger displays, with the progress panel on the left and the weeks list on the right, both scrollable independently across the full screen.
Today's reading is now highlighted in the day list, making it easier to find where you should be.
Smoother response when marking days as read in the reading plan, especially on older devices.
Improved vertical alignment between the progress panel and the weeks list in the new two-column reading plan layout.
The message in the plan progress card now adapts to your journey, highlighting book milestones, your reading streak, today's reading, or your overall Bible progress.
1.14.0: When changing the app language, the current language now appears highlighted at the top of the list, with the rest sorted alphabetically.
1.13.0: Fix extra whitespace below the search bar on the books screen.
You can now change the app language from the 'More' screen. English, Portuguese (Brazil), and Spanish are available.
1.12.0: Notifications about the download progress of Bible versions.
1.11.0: Bible available for download and offline reading.
Users can now select the text from the book synopsis.
1.10.0: Improved dynamic configuration loading on iOS to prevent synchronization issues.
Added localized network permission descriptions on iOS.
New book details screen to track your progress chapter by chapter.
Improved accessibility for the favorite button.
1.9.0: Refactored the "More" screen for better organization and usability.
Display the current app version in the "More" screen.
Detection of the current app version is now dynamic in the release notes.
1.8.1: Fix a bug that could cause reading progress to be lost after an update.
1.8.0: Refactoring of date representation logic to be more dynamic.
UI improvements for future version display.
Change icon colors in the "More" screen for some items.
Improved Theme Selection UI: new layout, added contrast selection, and moved dynamic colors option.
1.7.0: Introduce loading to indicate that some remote configs are fetching from the server.
New books screen that allows you to track progress, perform searches, apply filters, sort, and favorite.
1.6.2: Await for some remote configuration before bein able to proceed with other operations.
1.6.1: Spacing fixes in a lot of screens, mainly for Android 15+ in system bars.
1.6.0: New "More", screen focoused in general settings and useful links.
Fix scrolling in some screens in landscape format.
Use cards in the user interface for passage lists in day details screen.
1.4.0: Implement personal notes for reading plan days.
Correct formatting in the notes section.
1.3.0: Add planned read dates to reading plan days.
Fix: correct calculation of planned read date.
Change text order in the top bar of day details screen.
1.2.2: Fix: day details missing information when we should read specific verses.
1.2.1: Fix date formatting to support localized month names.
1.2.0: Add transition animation when navigating from plans screen to the day details screen. The animation was added in the words for the day and week.
Animate progress counters for day and progress in plans screen and day details screen.
Add visibility animation to the "go to unread" button.
Add English and Spanish localization for app name in iOS.
1.1.0: Replace icon for change theme in the reading plans screen.
Show snackbar message when no reading progress to delete.
1.0.0: The first version of Bible Planner 🚀.
